g.text: Figure 5. Cross-check between literature-derived dimensions and website-derived clusters
Independent website clusters map onto the RMCT dimensions; filled markers indicate primary alignment and open markers indicate overlap.
D1 Process; D2 Material; D3 Certification/quality; D4 Sector/market; D5 Design/engineering; D6 Digital/smart; D7 Commercial/supply; D8 Sustainability/lifecycle
